title: Combat Hitboxes: Players Only
description: Shows hitboxes only for players when F3+B is pressed. All other entity and mob hitboxes are hidden.
body:
## Combat Hitboxes: Players Only

### What's new in v1.1.0
- Added `/combathitboxes looklines true/false` command to toggle player look direction arrows on and off

Press **F3+B** to toggle hitboxes. Unlike vanilla or other hitbox mods, this mod shows hitboxes **only for players** — no item entities, no mobs, no animals cluttering your screen.

Perfect for PvP combat where you need to see player hitboxes without the noise of every other entity in the world.

### What it does
- Shows the standard vanilla hitbox for every player in range
- Completely hides hitboxes for all other entity types
- Toggle player look direction arrows with `/combathitboxes looklines true/false`
- No config files, no keybinds — just install and use F3+B as normal
- **No Fabric API required** — Fabric Loader only

### Supported
- Fabric / Quilt — 1.21.11, 26.1, 26.2
- NeoForge — 1.21.11, 26.1, 26.2
